programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: An engaged couple in Austin, Texas, looks for a first home; he wants to be close to downtown in a modern condo with an entertainment room, while she wants a suburban Craftsman with a craft room.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: After years of moving around, a young family is happy to put down roots in Stephenville, Texas: She wants a home with character and doesn't mind projects, while he wants a new house that's move-in ready.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A married couple look to downsize and find a smaller home in Loudon, Tenn.; they're looking for a single family home on one level that's move-in ready, but with a strict budget and a lot of demands, finding the right place will be difficult.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A couple is relocating to Los Angeles, and she has a serious case of sticker shock; he wants something with modern touches that's move-in ready, while she wants four bedrooms and doesn't mind renovations to save money.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A Los Angeles couple spends their entire married lives in a very walkable West Hollywood; they look for something with more space, but finding an affordable place where they don't have to drive is a challenge.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A husband has convinced his wife to move from sunny Los Angeles to his snowy home state of Minnesota in search of affordable housing.
